Also Jira (line 15: 'Preserved'), Code Intelligence (lines 19-21: 'Preserved (existing)' and 'Added (new limitation)'), and Bug Configuration (line 25: 'Up to date').

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 28-30 show: '## Security Configuration' with '- **Status**: Opt-in offered — user declined' and '- **Action**: Security triage not enabled; section not added'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after Bug Configuration at line 50.
